channel.title: Calix[4]arene; nucleic bases; co-crystal; X-ray analysis; Hirshfeldsurface analysis on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Calix[4]arene; nucleic bases; co-crystal; X-ray analysis; Hirshfeldsurface analysis on LMI

item.title: The solid-state structures of organic salts formed by calix[4]arenedihydroxyphosphonic acid with nucleic bases cations: adeninium,cytosinium, guaninium and uracilium
